seo.title: Request a Website Quote in Nova Scotia | Hatt Digital
seo.description: Request a website quote from Hatt Digital. Choose the option that sounds closest to what you need, tell me about your business, goals, and budget, and I will reply within one business day.

og_description: Choose the option that sounds closest to what you need, tell me about your business, goals, and budget, and I will build a fair quote around your project.

hero.heading: Request a Website Quote
hero.lead: Choose the website option that sounds closest to what you need, then tell me about your business, goals, and budget. I’ll use that to build a fair quote around the actual project.
hero.note: The option you choose is just a starting point.  Every business is different.

form_lead: This only takes a minute. Most details are optional — just share what you can.
success: Thanks! Your quote request is in — I’ll reply within one business day.

s1.heading: Choose your website type
s1.note: Pick the option that sounds closest to what you need. If you came from a package on the site, it’s already selected — change it any time.

packages.label: Best for getting online properly
packages.desc: A focused website for small businesses that need a clean, credible online presence. Most land between $500–$800.

packages.label: Best for most businesses
packages.desc: A stronger multi-page website for service businesses that need more trust and better structure. Most land between $900–$1,500.

packages.label: Best for custom needs
packages.desc: A flexible option for extra pages, quote or booking flows, CMS options, or custom features. Quoted flat, by scope.

s2.heading: Project budget range
s2.note: This helps me recommend the right scope — it does not lock you into a final price.
s2.unsure: I’m not sure yet — I’d like help choosing a fair budget.

s3.heading: Basic details
s3.hint: Add an email or a phone number so I can reply.

s5.heading: Optional details
s5.note: Add these if you have them. If not, leave them blank.

foot: No pressure. I’ll review your details and reply with the next best step.
